productDisplayName: Converse Men CT COLOR HI Black Black Casual Shoes
description: Up your style quotient with these classic Chuck Taylor high ankle shoes from converse.  Team these comfy pair of sneakers with jeans and bioworld tees for a great casual look.Upper   Canvas upper for durability and protection Textile lining for greater comfort Lace-ups for snug Fit Metal eyelets for the laces for greater eye appeal and durability Appliqued All Star heel patch on the ankle Rubber toe box for greater protection   Midsole   Cushioned insole for all day comfort   Outsole   Rubber outsole with multi0directional pattern for greater grip and durability
